Raising her staff as green lightning arcs from it into the canopy above
Drawing a circle of glowing runes on the ground with her bare foot
Commanding roots to erupt from the earth, forming a living barrier
Pressing both hands into the soil, a pulse of green energy spreading outward
Calling a storm by spinning her staff overhead, clouds gathering impossibly fast
Healing a wounded tree by placing her hands on the bark, golden light flowing in
Shape-shifting mid-transformation, half-woman half-wolf, caught between forms
Summoning a wall of thorns from the earth with a sweeping arm gesture
Meditating in mid-air, levitating slightly above a glowing ritual circle
Pouring water from a cup onto barren ground, wildflowers erupting instantly
Chanting with arms raised as the entire forest canopy sways in unison
Striding through fire unburned, her cloak of living leaves untouched by flame
Slamming her staff down, mushroom circles blooming outward in concentric rings of bioluminescence
Conjuring a spectral stag from swirling emerald mist with outstretched hands
Weaving vines into a living shield with rapid hand gestures, thorns glistening
Touching a cracked boulder, moss spreading across its surface in seconds
Transforming into a flock of ravens mid-leap, feathers exploding outward
Breathing frost onto dead branches, ice flowers crystallizing along the wood
Plunging her hand into a tree trunk, extracting glowing amber sap
Directing swarms of fireflies with conducting motions, forming luminous patterns
Kneeling as antlers sprout from her head, eyes glowing white with power
Hurling seeds that burst into massive oak saplings upon impact
Channeling moonlight through cupped hands into a sphere of silver energy
Carving symbols into earth with a ritual dagger, soil turning to fertile loam
Dissolving into a swirl of autumn leaves, reforming elsewhere
